news.title:
Indian mid-sized IT firms like Persistent, Hexaware, and Firstsource focus on Asia and Africa for growth amid US slowdown.
Persistent diversifies via acquisitions; Infosys, Wipro expand in Australia; TCS grows in India with large contracts.
news.summary:
Indian mid-sized IT firms like Persistent, Hexaware, and Firstsource focus on Asia and Africa for growth amid US slowdown.
Persistent diversifies via acquisitions; Infosys, Wipro expand in Australia; TCS grows in India with large contracts.

news.title:
Nifty IT fell 1.5% as fears of Iran's threats to subsea cables heightened risks to India's digital connectivity.
TCS rose, while Infosys, Persistent Systems, OFSS, LTIMindtree, and others declined. Analysts see volatility ahead for IT stocks.
news.summary:
Nifty IT fell 1.5% as fears of Iran's threats to subsea cables heightened risks to India's digital connectivity.
TCS rose, while Infosys, Persistent Systems, OFSS, LTIMindtree, and others declined. Analysts see volatility ahead for IT stocks.

news.title:
Persistent Systems Ltd signs SPA to transfer 100% shareholding of Persistent Systems France S.A.S. to Aepona Group Ltd, Ireland.
The restructuring aims to enhance entity rationalization and operational efficiency within the group by March 31, 2026.
news.summary:
Persistent Systems Ltd signs SPA to transfer 100% shareholding of Persistent Systems France S.A.S. to Aepona Group Ltd, Ireland.
The restructuring aims to enhance entity rationalization and operational efficiency within the group by March 31, 2026.

news.title:
Persistent Systems saw a Rs. 48.85 Cr block trade on NSE for ~103,747 shares.
The trade price was Rs. 4708.9 per share.
news.summary:
Persistent Systems saw a Rs. 48.85 Cr block trade on NSE for ~103,747 shares.

news.title:
Persistent Systems held an investor session with Cusana Capital on March 18, 2026.
No new info was shared; details were reiterated from Q3FY26 earnings call.
news.summary:

news.title:
Persistent Systems partners with NVIDIA to deploy AI-powered GenMolVS for drug discovery, leveraging NVIDIA's BioNeMo platform.
Persistent stock fell 2.5% to ₹4523.3 on NSE, down 28% YTD despite 890% return over five years.
news.summary:
Persistent Systems partners with NVIDIA to deploy AI-powered GenMolVS for drug discovery, leveraging NVIDIA's BioNeMo platform.
Persistent stock fell 2.5% to ₹4523.3 on NSE, down 28% YTD despite 890% return over five years.

news.title:
Persistent Systems unveils AI-driven generative molecules and virtual screening solution.
The solution leverages Nvidia's technology to enhance its capabilities.
news.summary:
Persistent Systems unveils AI-driven generative molecules and virtual screening solution.
The solution leverages Nvidia's technology to enhance its capabilities.

news.title:
Persistent Systems CMD highlights AI's impact, urging IT firms to expand beyond traditional clients.
He emphasizes stronger sales, execution, and focus on global markets to leverage AI opportunities.
news.summary:

news.title:
Persistent Systems' ESOP Trust plans to acquire 100,000 shares by March 31, 2026.
Purchases will follow SEBI regulations and the company’s insider trading code, starting March 12, 2026.
news.summary:
Persistent Systems' ESOP Trust plans to acquire 100,000 shares by March 31, 2026.
Purchases will follow SEBI regulations and the company’s insider trading code, starting March 12, 2026.

news.summary:

news.title:
Persistent Systems Ltd restructures by transferring 100% shareholding of Persistent Systems Poland to Aepona Group.
The transaction involves cash consideration of PLN 8.8M to enhance operational efficiency and entity rationalization.
news.summary:

news.title:
Infosys, Persistent, Mphasis shares rise as rupee hits record low of 92.28/USD, boosting margins.
Nifty IT index up 20% YTD; IT stocks rebound from 52-week lows, Persistent gains 12%, Mphasis up 10%.
news.summary:

The merger, effective Feb 2026, enhances efficiency without cash transactions or shareholding changes.
news.summary:

news.title:
Ashoka Buildcon, Natco Pharma, and Persistent Systems report OCF > ₹1,000 Cr, signaling strong core operations.

news.title:

Despite cuts, CLSA remains optimistic, preferring Tech Mahindra, Infosys, Persistent Systems, and Coforge.
